category_sources: source_facts.description says oslo is a CLI tool for the OpenSLO spec; official openslo.com describes OpenSLO as an SLO language for reliability and performance targets.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and current_curation.display-name both provide oslo; official OpenSLO site links to Oslo.
docs_sources: Official OpenSLO/oslo README documents installation and usage; official openslo.com describes Oslo Validation CLI and the OpenSLO specification.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/OpenSLO/oslo; per instruction repo was not redetermined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies the OpenSLO CLI; official openslo.com describes SLO definitions, YAML specification, and Oslo validation CLI for GitOps workflows.
